data.name: AdminLogin_InvalidPasswordMessage
data.value: The administrator password is incorrect. Verify it and try again.

data.name: AdminLogin_MissingBaseUserMessage
data.value: There is no base user associated with this administrator.

data.name: AdminLogin_MissingUserMessage
data.value: You must enter the administrator user.

data.name: AdminLogin_NotRegisteredMessage
data.value: The administrator user is not registered. Verify it and try again.

data.name: AdminRegister_AlreadyRegisteredMessage
data.value: An administrator is already registered with that email.

data.name: AdminRegister_DeviceUserMissingMessage
data.value: Could not detect the device user.

data.name: AdminRegister_IncompleteDataMessage
data.value: Complete email, role, user password, and administrator password.

data.name: AdminRegister_InvalidDerivedUserMessage
data.value: Could not derive a valid user from the email.

data.name: AdminRegister_RegisterErrorMessage
data.value: Could not complete the administrator registration right now.

data.name: Common_DatabaseBusyRetryMessage
data.value: The database is busy. Please try again.

data.name: Common_DatabaseBusySaveRetryMessage
data.value: The database is busy. Please try saving again.

data.name: Help_AdminSubtitle
data.value: Review the entire system documentation organized by folders and documents.

data.name: Help_EmptySelectDescription
data.value: Use the navigation selector to open a guide, manual, or procedure when you need it.

data.name: Help_EmptySelectHint
data.value: No content is displayed automatically so you can choose exactly which document to review.

data.name: Help_LoadErrorDescription
data.value: An error occurred while inspecting the configured help folder for this profile.

data.name: Help_NavigationDescription
data.value: Browse documents, manuals, and procedures available for your profile.

data.name: Help_NoDocsDescription
data.value: No help files were found for this profile in the configured folder.

data.name: Help_NoDocsHint
data.value: Check that the Docs folder exists in the execution directory and contains documents enabled for this user.

data.name: Help_SupportDescription
data.value: If you need additional assistance, contact the system owner.

data.name: Help_UserSubtitle
data.value: Review only the documentation available for the end user.

data.name: Installers_RunUnexpectedErrorMessage
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while running the installer.

data.name: Installers_Subtitle
data.value: Manage and run the installers available by folder.

data.name: Login_InvalidPasswordMessage
data.value: The password is incorrect. Verify it and try again.

data.name: Login_MissingUserMessage
data.value: You must enter your user or email.

data.name: Login_UserNotRegisteredMessage
data.value: The entered user or email is not registered. Verify it and try again.

data.name: Logs_DateTooltip
data.value: Select the date you want to inspect.

data.name: Logs_FilteredLoadErrorStatus
data.value: Could not load the filtered logs.

data.name: Logs_FilterRefreshErrorStatus
data.value: Could not refresh the log filters.

data.name: Logs_MachineSelectedStatus
data.value: Machine {0} selected. Now choose a date.

data.name: Logs_MachineTooltip
data.value: Select the machine you want to review.

data.name: Logs_NoDatesForMachineStatus
data.value: Machine {0} has no available log date folders.

data.name: Logs_SelectDateToLoadStatus
data.value: Select a date for the machine to load the logs.

data.name: Logs_SelectMachineAndDateStatus
data.value: Select a machine and then a date to load the logs.

data.name: Logs_SelectMachineStatus
data.value: Select a machine to view its date folders.

data.name: Logs_SelectMachineToLoadStatus
data.value: Select a machine to load the logs.

data.name: Logs_Subtitle
data.value: Inspect activity, errors, and latency by machine and date.

data.name: Recovery_CodeDisplayedMessage
data.value: Code displayed successfully. Enter that code and define your new password.

data.name: Recovery_IdentityValidatedMessage
data.value: Identity validated. Wait for the visual code to continue.

data.name: Recovery_MissingCodeMessage
data.value: You must enter the displayed validation code.

data.name: Recovery_MissingEmailMessage
data.value: Enter the registered email to continue.

data.name: Recovery_MissingPasswordsMessage
data.value: You must complete the new password and confirmation.

data.name: Recovery_NotRobotRequiredMessage
data.value: You must confirm the "I'm not a robot" validation.

data.name: Recovery_PasswordHint
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters long.

data.name: Recovery_PasswordLengthMessage
data.value: The new password must be at least 6 characters long.

data.name: Recovery_PasswordMismatchMessage
data.value: The confirmation does not match the new password.

data.name: Recovery_RegisteredEmailTooltip
data.value: Enter the same email used to register in the system.

data.name: Recovery_RequestCodeFirstMessage
data.value: First request and view the validation code.

data.name: Recovery_Subtitle
data.value: Validate your identity and update the password without leaving the flow.

data.name: Recovery_UserNotFoundMessage
data.value: There is no registered user with that email.

data.name: Recovery_ValidationHint
data.value: First confirm your email and the manual validation.

data.name: Register_DeviceUserValidationMessage
data.value: Could not validate the device user.

data.name: Register_ErrorMessage
data.value: Could not complete the registration right now. Try again.

data.name: Register_ExistingUserMessage
data.value: The user is already registered with that email.

data.name: Register_IncompleteDataMessage
data.value: You must enter email and password.

data.name: Register_Subtitle
data.value: Use your corporate email to enable system access.

data.name: Settings_AppearanceDescription
data.value: Choose how you want the system interface to look, following the animation.

data.name: Settings_Subtitle
data.value: Customize the visual experience of the system.

data.name: UserForm_CreateConflictMessage
data.value: The email is already registered or the database is busy.

data.name: UserForm_AdminCreateErrorMessage
data.value: Could not create the administrator right now.

data.name: UserManagement_EditErrorMessage
data.value: An error occurred while editing the user.

data.name: UserManagement_SaveAssignmentErrorMessage
data.value: An error occurred while saving the assignment.

data.name: RecoveryPopup_RememberCodeHint
data.value: Remember the code and continue with the password change.

data.name: RecoveryPopup_Countdown
data.value: This window will close in {0} seconds.

data.name: Help_FileMissingMessage
data.value: The selected file does not exist in the documentation directory.

data.name: Help_ReadErrorMessage
data.value: The document could not be loaded.

data.name: Help_RenderErrorMessage
data.value: The selected document could not be rendered.

data.name: Help_NoDocumentContentMessage
data.value: There is no documentation available to display.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_HeaderSubtitle
data.value: Executive reading and real traceability over captured logs

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_FiltersSubtitle
data.value: Keeps the real drill-down into the lower grid without inventing service states.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_ByFamilySubtitle
data.value: Each block prioritizes status-page readability while staying anchored to signals that truly exist in the logs.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_DistributionsSubtitle
data.value: Quick actions keep filtering the lower grid by real module, user, or machine.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_SourceActivitySubtitle
data.value: Click to focus the grid and review module traces.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_UserActivitySubtitle
data.value: Click to open the activity focus by operator.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_MachineActivitySubtitle
data.value: Click to concentrate analysis by physical machine.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_TeamTaxonomySubtitle
data.value: There is no business-team taxonomy in the current telemetry.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_TeamTaxonomyDetail
data.value: A real team view needs one more dimension in the logs; this page does not invent it.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_ObservablePerformanceSubtitle
data.value: Native latency bands without external libraries or artificial charts.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_TimelineSubtitle
data.value: Lower prioritized list for quick follow-up. Click an event to drill down with filters into the grid.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_FilteredTracesSubtitle
data.value: Final detail table for investigation, auditing, and drill-down from the upper panels.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_NarrativeHoverActiveFormat
data.value: Hover active on {0}: the detail stays visible while you keep the pointer over this block. Click only if you want to pin context or drill down.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_ExecutiveStatusTitle
data.value: Executive status for the filtered range

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_ExecutiveStatusDetailFallback
data.value: The summary is based on observable logs; it does not represent uptime.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_HeartbeatAliveOnly
data.value: The app only reports heartbeat while it is alive.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_NoDependenciesObservableYet
data.value: There are no observable dependencies yet.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_SelectHistoricalSegmentStatus
data.value: Select a historical segment to pin narrative context and drill down coherently.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_HeaderSubtitle
data.value: Real-time and historical operational reading using only real observable signals.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_FiltersSubtitle
data.value: Language changes must preserve the existing filters, drill-down, and refresh behavior.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_ByFamilySubtitle
data.value: Honest summary of incidents, validations, latency, activity, and operational health.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_DistributionsSubtitle
data.value: Quick actions still filter the lower grid by real module, user, or machine.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_SourceActivitySubtitle
data.value: Click to focus the grid and inspect module traces.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_MachineActivitySubtitle
data.value: Click to focus the analysis by physical machine.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_TeamTaxonomySubtitle
data.value: There is no business team taxonomy in the current telemetry.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_TeamTaxonomyDetail
data.value: A real team view would require an extra dimension in the logs; this page does not invent it.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_ObservablePerformanceSubtitle
data.value: Native latency bands with no external libraries or artificial charts.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_TimelineSubtitle
data.value: Prioritized lower list for quick follow-up. Click an event to drill down with filters.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_FilteredTracesSubtitle
data.value: Final detail table for investigation, auditing, and drill-down from the upper panels.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_ExecutiveStatusTitle
data.value: Executive status for the filtered range

data.name: Logs_MainInitFailedObservable
data.value: Main initialization completed with observable failure

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_InstrumentationNoteNoHealth
data.value: No real availability instrumentation yet; only app/health events are shown when present.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_InstrumentationNoteNoHeartbeat
data.value: Desktop heartbeat is not yet visible for the full filtered history.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_InstrumentationNoteNoDependencies
data.value: Critical dependencies still lack full observable coverage in the current window.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_InstrumentationNoteNoSessions
data.value: Persisted sessions are not yet captured; for now activity is inferred from login/logout.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_InstrumentationNotePartialValidations
data.value: Semantically exploitable validations are still partial.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_NoObservableDataExplanation
data.value: There are no real signals in this period, so the dashboard does not invent health or recovery.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_RecoveryNotObservableWithTelemetry
data.value: Recovery is not observable with the current telemetry.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_RelatedEventsForDrillDownFormat
data.value: This bucket contains {0} related events for drill-down.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_PartialCoverageSilenceWarning
data.value: Period coverage is partial, so don't over-interpret silence as health.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_FactNarrativeReadingHint
data.value: Narrative reading derived from real signals.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_PartialCoverageWindowHint
data.value: The window does not cover the full expected signal.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_ObservableSignalsBucketHint
data.value: There are observable signals for this bucket.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_ActivityWithoutDominantIncident
data.value: Observable activity without a dominant incident

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_NoIncidentObservableInPeriod
data.value: No observable incident in the period

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_ActivityEventsNoIncidentEscalationFormat
data.value: There are {0} observable events in the bucket, but none needs to be escalated as an incident.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_TelemetryNoAnomalyForFamily
data.value: There is telemetry in the period, but no anomalous signal appears for this family.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_PartialCoverageHealthExplanation
data.value: There is general activity in the bucket, but not enough health/dependency signal to assert full operational health.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_PartialCoverageLatencyExplanation
data.value: There are events in the bucket, but not enough durations to describe full performance.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_PartialCoverageValidationsExplanation
data.value: The app had activity in the bucket, but no exploitable validations surfaced for quality reading.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_PartialCoverageGenericFormat
data.value: {0} events were detected in the period, though coverage for this family is still partial.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_NoRecentSignalCurrentFilter
data.value: No recent signal in the current filter; check range, machine, or instrumentation coverage.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_ExecutiveAttentionHealthFormat
data.value: Operational attention: dependency or health failures are visible. Last signal {0}; observable coverage {1}/5.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_ExecutiveAttentionErrorsFormat
data.value: Operational attention: {0} visible errors out of {1} events, with observable coverage {2}/5.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_ExecutiveReviewWarningsFormat
data.value: Operation under review: no visible errors, but {0} warnings and observable coverage {1}/5.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_ExecutiveReviewHealthFormat
data.value: Operation under review: last signal {0}, heartbeat {1}, and dependencies {2}.

data.name: Logs_Dashboard_ExecutiveOperationalFormat
data.value: Observable operation within the selected range, with {0} events and baseline coverage {1}/5.

data.name: AdminRegister_DeveloperAccountForbidden
data.value: This email is reserved for the Developer profile and cannot be registered as an administrator.

data.name: Help_DeveloperSubtitle
data.value: Browse the technical documentation enabled for development continuity, support, and investigation.

data.name: Logs_Audit_LanguageChanged
data.value: The application language was changed to {0}.

data.name: DeveloperAccounts_Subtitle
data.value: Add or disable Developer accounts. Available to the Super Admin only.

data.name: AdminLogin_DeveloperDisabledMessage
data.value: The Developer account is disabled. Contact the Super Admin.

data.name: UserManagement_CannotDeleteDeveloper
data.value: This user is reserved as a Developer. Disable it from Developer management.

data.name: UserManagement_CannotDeleteSuperAdmin
data.value: The Super Admin cannot be deleted.

data.name: UserManagement_CannotDeleteAdmin
data.value: You do not have permission to delete administrators.

data.name: UserManagement_EditForbiddenAdminDeveloper
data.value: You do not have permission to edit administrators or developers.

data.name: DeveloperAccounts_SuperAdminCannotBeDeveloper
data.value: The Super Admin cannot be registered as a Developer.

data.name: DeveloperAccounts_CannotDisableSuperAdmin
data.value: The Super Admin cannot be disabled.

data.name: DeveloperAccounts_SaveError
data.value: Could not save the developer right now.

data.name: DeveloperAccounts_MissingBaseUser
data.value: A base user with this email must exist first (to set a password). Create it from User Management and then enable it as Developer.
